title: Spectrumcraft SMP
description:
A modpack designed for the Spectrumcraft SMP
A fully modded server made by me for my friends
body:
![[THE LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WTO3AGd1/images/9988369b4399059326aabda8ff1f709c72a25aa2.png)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WTO3AGd1/images/e46ff6701dd2f98cd08193c9d70cae9d371d63d4.png)

# In English
Hello, this is the modpack made for Spectrumcraft SMP, a server that is mostly vanilla+ features for now but soon it will have a fully modded experience, it has all the mods required on client-side and It's meant to be on modrinth to provide an easy way to install and update the modpack (as most of the users are not experts, plus It's way better than a drive), have fun!
# En Español
Hola, este es el modpack para Spectrumcraft SMP, un server que es mayormente vanilla+ por ahora pero pronto sera una experience mucho mas modificada, maeste contiene todos los mods requeridos por los jugadores y see encuentra ya en modrinth para proveer una manera mas facil de descargar y actualizar el modpack (ya queue la mayoria de los miembros del server no son expertos, ademas de ser mucho mejor que un drive) ¡Diviertanse!
